title: REKT:TV - Ape Tax
paragraphs: Four billion years have passed since we first emerged from the primordial soup, and now a new evolution has begun.
Ape Season is here, and Ape Tax must be paid.
This digital darwinism takes place over blocks rather than millennia.
Just as relevant as when it was first published in December of 2020 , our second major video release is an animated assessment of our online gambling culture.
Subtitles are available in various languages, and more will be added soon.
If you enjoy our content, please donate to our Gitcoin Grant.
You see it’s true, an ape like me, can learn to be like someone like you

fullText: REKT:TV - Ape Tax Friday, December 3, 2021 ape tax - rektTV read this article also in : zh Now don’t try to kid me man cub, I made a deal with you. Four billion years have passed since we first emerged from the primordial soup, and now a new evolution has begun. Ape Season is here, and Ape Tax must be paid. This digital darwinism takes place over blocks rather than millennia. Just as relevant as when it was first published in December of 2020 , our second major video release is an animated assessment of our online gambling culture. Subtitles are available in various languages, and more will be added soon. If you enjoy our content, please donate to our Gitcoin Grant.
